mapper.insert: INSERT INTO MEMBER ( user_id, password, name, birth_date, email, phone, address, gender ) VALUES ( #{user_id, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{password, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{name, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{birth_date, jdbcType=DATE}, #{email, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{phone, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{address, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{gender, jdbcType=CHAR} )
